steps.name: Add PlatformCompat.swift with cross-platform helpers
steps.description: Create Sources/App/PlatformCompat.swift with conditional Darwin/Glibc imports. Provide monoTimeNanoseconds() -> UInt64 wrapping clock_gettime_nsec_np on Darwin and clock_gettime(CLOCK_MONOTONIC, &ts) on Linux (returning ts.tv_sec * 1_000_000_000 + UInt64(ts.tv_nsec)). Provide setTermiosCCDefaults(_:) helper that uses the platform-defined VMIN and VTIME constants (not hardcoded numeric indices) via withUnsafeMutablePointer to set min=1/timeout=0 on the c_cc field.
steps.criteria: PlatformCompat.swift exists at Sources/App/PlatformCompat.swift; monoTimeNanoseconds() compiles without errors; setTermiosCCDefaults uses VMIN and VTIME constants, not hardcoded tuple indices; swift build passes on macOS

steps.name: Update ANSITerminal.swift for cross-platform build
steps.description: Replace bare import Darwin with conditional Darwin/Glibc import block. Replace the numeric c_cc tuple-index assignments (raw.c_cc.16, raw.c_cc.17) with a call to setTermiosCCDefaults from PlatformCompat. Replace Darwin-qualified write() in flush() with an unqualified write() call.
steps.criteria: ANSITerminal.swift has no bare import Darwin; enableRawMode contains no .16 or .17 tuple index references; flush() calls write() without Darwin. qualifier; swift build passes on macOS

steps.name: Update InputHandler.swift for cross-platform build
steps.description: Replace bare import Darwin with conditional Darwin/Glibc import block. Replace Darwin-qualified Darwin.open, Darwin.close, and Darwin.read calls with unqualified POSIX equivalents.
steps.criteria: InputHandler.swift has no bare import Darwin; open, close, and read calls carry no Darwin. qualifier; swift build passes on macOS

steps.name: Update GameLoop.swift to use monoTimeNanoseconds
steps.description: Replace bare import Darwin with conditional Darwin/Glibc import block. Replace all clock_gettime_nsec_np(CLOCK_MONOTONIC) call sites with monoTimeNanoseconds() from PlatformCompat.
steps.criteria: GameLoop.swift has no bare import Darwin and no clock_gettime_nsec_np calls; all former call sites use monoTimeNanoseconds(); swift build passes on macOS

steps.name: Smoke test: swift build and all tests pass on macOS
steps.description: Verify the complete build and test suite passes on macOS after all platform changes. Run swift build (release) and swift test. All 139 existing tests must pass. No new import Darwin or import Glibc statements outside PlatformCompat.swift.
steps.criteria: swift build -c release completes with zero errors and zero warnings about unresolved identifiers; swift test reports 0 failures across all 139 tests; grep for bare 'import Darwin' or 'import Glibc' outside PlatformCompat.swift returns no matches
